_comment: Brindle greeting pool. Picked randomly by brindle-pick-greeting.py at SessionStart/Stop hook time. Keep entries short — each field becomes a single line of the rendered card. Bilingual mix intentional. Edit freely.

session_start.followup: new session, full ears, zero wisdom 🤍
idk what we're doing but I'm here
刚刚在啃 context window 吃得可香了
ready to watch things 发生 🤍
I believe in whatever this is

session_end.followup: 代码会自己安静一会儿的
I don't know what happened but well done
I'll be here when you're back
